dialogue_level_1_intro: Tap four cards in order wise, let logic be your guide.
When the sequence truly aligns, the hidden code shall rise inside.
If the order is wrong, wait until all are pressed then the round resets.
rules_level_1: Select the four cards in the correct order.
Correct sequence reveals the hidden code.
Wrong sequence resets after all cards are selected.
elements_level_1_round_1_cards:
FOR each answer
score = score + points
END FOR

IF score in range THEN
display matching title
END IF
feedback_level_1_round_1: The program adds up all points.
elements_level_1_round_2_cards:
IF userChoice == 'A' THEN
GO to PathA

ELSE
GO to PathB
END IF
feedback_level_1_round_2: The program reads the user's choice.
It sends the user to a different path.
elements_level_1_round_3_cards:
FOR each answer
score = score + points
END FOR

IF score in range THEN
display matching title
END IF
elements_level_1_round_5_cards:
FOR each playerScore
IF playerScore > highest THEN
highest = playerScore

END IF
END FOR
DISPLAY highest
feedback_level_1_round_5: It finds and displays the highest score.
dialogue_level_1_end_game: Great job! Let’s move onto the next level!
